title: colutea frigida
intro: Colutea frigida, also known as the cold horse-chestnut or cold bladder-senna, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating gastrointestinal problems. Colutea frigida is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, and its extracts are also used in some traditional medicines.
